source_references.title: Qualtran call graph protocol
source_references.reason: Reference design for hierarchical subroutine accounting and leaf-count sigma extraction.

source_references.title: Qualtran protocols overview
source_references.reason: Reference for decomposition plus call-graph style composition over named quantum subroutines.

families.name: folded_standard_qroam_streamed_coordinate_v1__streamed_lookup_tail_leaf_v1__semiclassical_qft_v1
families.summary: Central standard-QROAM lookup family: folded lookup control with standard QROAM coordinate streams consumed by table-controlled arithmetic kernels. / Space-compressed shell that uses a Griffiths–Niu-style semiclassical inverse QFT and reuses a single phase qubit. / Executable streamed lookup leaf with table-fed coordinate multipliers, boundary no-op semantics, and a counted multi-output complete-add tail.

nodes.summary: Central standard-QROAM lookup family: folded lookup control with standard QROAM coordinate streams consumed by table-controlled arithmetic kernels. / Space-compressed shell that uses a Griffiths–Niu-style semiclassical inverse QFT and reuses a single phase qubit. / Executable streamed lookup leaf with table-fed coordinate multipliers, boundary no-op semantics, and a counted multi-output complete-add tail.
Bundle covering the 31 repeated raw-window leaf invocations after the direct seed.
Per-leaf arithmetic cluster composed from opcode bundles and explicit stage/block lowerings.
Exact table-fed x-coordinate field multiplication kernel with no materialized lookup-output field lane.
Standard QROAM table-data selection for one 256-bit streamed lookup_x coordinate.
Standard QROAM compute for one selected lookup_x coordinate stream.
Measured standard-QROAM cleanup for one selected lookup_x coordinate stream.
Schoolbook partial-product grid.
One schoolbook partial-product interaction for each pair of field bits.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add contribution.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract contribution.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Exact table-fed y-coordinate field multiplication kernel with no materialized lookup-output field lane.
Standard QROAM table-data selection for one 256-bit streamed lookup_y coordinate.
Standard QROAM compute for one selected lookup_y coordinate stream.
Measured standard-QROAM cleanup for one selected lookup_y coordinate stream.
Schoolbook partial-product grid.
One schoolbook partial-product interaction for each pair of field bits.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add contribution.

Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract contribution.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Exact table-fed (x+y)-coordinate field multiplication kernel with no materialized lookup-output field lane.
Standard QROAM table-data selection for one 256-bit streamed lookup_x_plus_y coordinate.
Standard QROAM compute for one selected lookup_x_plus_y coordinate stream.
Measured standard-QROAM cleanup for one selected lookup_x_plus_y coordinate stream.
Schoolbook partial-product grid.
One schoolbook partial-product interaction for each pair of field bits.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add contribution.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract contribution.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Exact n-bit ripple-carry field-adder kernel over the checked leaf register width.
Temporary logical-AND carry ladder for the field-adder kernel.
One temporary logical-AND edge per carry transition in the ripple-carry adder.
Exact fused two-subtraction field kernel for a - b - c.
Two sequential temporary logical-AND borrow ladders.
Two 256-bit borrow ladders for a - b - c inside one field register.
Exact fused two-addition field kernel for multiplication by 3.
Two sequential temporary logical-AND carry ladders.
Two 256-bit carry ladders for 3a = a + a + a inside one field register.
Exact multi-output complete-add tail kernel from C, K, L, I, Y, and Z.
Standard QROAM table-data selection for one 256-bit streamed lookup_y coordinate.
Standard QROAM compute for one selected lookup_y coordinate stream.
Measured standard-QROAM cleanup for one selected lookup_y coordinate stream.
Schoolbook partial-product grid.
One schoolbook partial-product interaction for each pair of field bits.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add contribution.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract contribution.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Internal fixed multiplication F = 21Z.
Fixed multiplication F = 21Z inside the streamed tail macro.
Internal construction of E, M, and N.
Three field add/sub combines for E = Y + yZ, M = I + F, and N = I - F.
Six schoolbook partial-product grids for the complete-add tail.
Six schoolbook partial-product grids for KN, EC, NM, CL, ME, and LK.
Controlled-add paths for the six tail multiplications.
Six controlled-add accumulator paths, one for each tail multiplication.
Controlled-subtract paths for the six tail multiplications.
Six controlled-subtract accumulator paths, one for each tail multiplication.
Three add/sub combines that write X3, Y3, and Z3.
Three field add/sub combine ladders for X3, Y3, and Z3 after the six products.
Exact fixed-constant multiplication kernel for multiplication by 21.
Monotone addition-chain realization for multiplication by 21.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 1 -> 2.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 2 -> 4.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 4 -> 8.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 8 -> 16.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 16 -> 20.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 20 -> 21.
Central standard-QROAM lookup family: folded lookup control with standard QROAM coordinate streams consumed by table-controlled arithmetic kernels. for the direct_seed invocation scope.
Shared sign/magnitude classification for the 16-bit signed folded contract.
Temporary logical-AND ladder over the 15 magnitude bits.
Two mirrored temporary logical-AND ladders prepare the folded absolute value for the positive lookup domain.
Standard QROAM coordinate-stream compute is charged at the consuming arithmetic kernel.
Measured QROAM cleanup is charged at the consuming arithmetic kernel.
Applies the post-lookup Y negation required by negative raw words in the folded contract.
Field-width conditional subtraction/select network over the Y coordinate.

notes: This artifact expresses each named compiler family as a compositional FT-style call graph with hierarchical bundles and a traversed leaf sigma.
The FT IR spans the exact leaf interfaces checked into the compiler project.
